title: fix(enter): model list cut off in edit key dialog
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Seeing the whole list
gist.blurb: Fixed a pesky UI bug where the model list would get cut off in the edit key dialog. Now you can scroll through all the models to your heart's content!
gist.summary: Fixed an overflow issue in the API key edit dialog that prevented the model list from scrolling.
gist.impact: Users can now scroll through and select from the complete list of available models when editing API key permissions.
gist.visual_concept: The robot companion holding a very long, scrolling list (like a long receipt) of models, with the bee mascot happily reading it. Represents the newly scrollable, un-clipped list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a very long, scrolling receipt of code that trails onto the floor. The bee mascot hovers nearby, reading the list with tiny wizard glasses. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
